meaning: 加尔维斯敦[美国得克萨斯州东南部港市]
examples: Her mother ran a boardinghouse in Galveston, a seaside town near Houston, Texas.
It shook buildings as far away as Galveston, 90 miles to the southeast.
And those who retire under the Galveston model do much better than Social Security.
The hurricane center's five-day forecast places a landfall anywhere from Galveston, Texas, east to Mobile, Alabama.
